backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a PreOrder type and two endpoints: submitPreOrder (stores a new order with computed total and timestamp) and getAllPreOrders (returns all stored orders as an array).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single completed feature: replacing the N.B. Farm logo image in Footer.tsx with the new asset at '/assets/generated/nb-farm-logo.png' at an appropriate size.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, describing their purpose, key changes, and notable details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the design system's light and dark color themes, including background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title, SEO meta tags, Open Graph tags, and Google Fonts preconnect links, with a root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full single-page layout by rendering Navigation, all page sections (Hero through Contact), RangoliDivider separators between sections, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About N.B. Farm section displaying a Gir cow illustration with a '3 Generations of Farming' badge, four feature cards highlighting farm values, and a Sanskrit quote about cows and prosperity.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact & Orders section with a WhatsApp-linked contact form, phone/email/social links, and a submit handler that encodes the form data into a WhatsApp message URL.
Delivery Information section with four colored cards covering local delivery, morning milk supply, mango shipping, and bulk orders, plus a WhatsApp CTA banner at the bottom.
frontend/src/components/FarmGallerySecti: Renders a responsive photo gallery grid of N.B. Farm images with a lightbox viewer that supports next/previous navigation and keyboard accessibility.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Displays the site footer with the farm brand, tagline, social media links (Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp), quick navigation links, and a copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a farm sunrise background image, headline, decorative elements, and CTA buttons to order milk or pre-order mangoes via smooth scroll.
Shows the farm's physical location with an embedded Google Maps iframe alongside an address card with phone numbers and a directions link.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with a logo, desktop nav links, a WhatsApp order button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu that uses smooth scrolling.
frontend/src/components/PreOrderForm.tsx: React form component for mango pre-orders that calculates pricing based on variant and packaging size, validates input, opens a WhatsApp message, and submits order data to the backend via a mutation hook.
Displays N.B. Farm's product catalog including Gir A2 milk, mangoes, lemons, and seasonal spices, with feature lists and WhatsApp order links for each product.
frontend/src/components/RangoliDivider.t: Simple decorative divider component that renders a rangoli pattern image, with optional flip support for use between page sections.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUsSecti: Renders a 'Why Choose Us' section with five highlight cards covering farm freshness, ethical practices, no chemicals, direct delivery, and traditional values.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for submitting a mango pre-order mutation and fetching all pre-orders from the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, defines an earthy OKLCH CSS variable palette (light and dark), and sets up Tailwind utility/component layers with custom textures and typography classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/smoothScroll.ts: Utility function that smoothly scrolls the page to a target section by ID with a configurable top offset.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the farm website, extending the default theme with custom farm-palette colors (mud, turmeric, leaf, terracotta, offwhite), serif/handwritten fonts, custom shadows, and animations. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state tracker (version 33) describing the N.B. Farm website's features, architectural notes, known issues (hero heading cutoff, mango WhatsApp pre-order broken), and a full list of existing implemented features with their requirement IDs.
